tEn: GLM-4.5V and GLM-4.1V-Thinking: Towards Versatile Multimodal Reasoning with Scalable Reinforcement Learning
tZh: GLM-4.5V 和 GLM-4.1V-Thinking：迈向具有可扩展强化学习的通用多模态推理
sEn: We present GLM-4.1V-Thinking, GLM-4.5V, and GLM-4.6V, a family of vision-language models advancing general-purpose multimodal understanding and reasoning.
sZh: 我们提出了 GLM-4.1V-Thinking、GLM-4.5V 和 GLM-4.6V 系列视觉语言模型，旨在推进通用多模态理解与推理。
absEn: We present GLM-4.1V-Thinking, GLM-4.5V, and GLM-4.6V, a family of vision-language models (VLMs) designed to advance general-purpose multimodal understanding and reasoning. In this report, we share our key findings in the development of the reasoning-centric training framework. We first develop a capable vision foundation model with significant potential through large-scale pre-training, which arguably sets the upper bound for the final performance. We then propose Reinforcement Learning with Curriculum Sampling (RLCS) to unlock the full potential of the model, leading to comprehensive capability enhancement across a diverse range of tasks, including STEM problem solving, video understanding, content recognition, coding, grounding, GUI-based agents, and long document interpretation. In a comprehensive evaluation across 42 public benchmarks, GLM-4.5V achieves state-of-the-art performance on nearly all tasks among open-source models of similar size, and demonstrates competitive or even superior results compared to closed-source models such as Gemini-2.5-Flash on challenging tasks including Coding and GUI Agents. Meanwhile, the smaller GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking remains highly competitive-achieving superior results to the much larger Qwen2.5-VL-72B on 29 benchmarks. We open-source both GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking and GLM-4.5V. We further introduce the GLM-4.6V series, open-source multimodal models with native tool use and a 128K context window. A brief overview is available at https://z.ai/blog/glm-4.6v. Code, models and more information are released at https://github.com/zai-org/GLM-V.
absZh: 我们提出了 GLM-4.1V-Thinking、GLM-4.5V 和 GLM-4.6V 系列视觉语言模型（VLM），旨在推进通用多模态理解与推理。在本报告中，我们分享了以推理为中心的训练框架开发中的关键发现。我们首先通过大规模预训练开发了一个具有显著潜力的强大视觉基础模型，这可以说是最终性能的上限。然后，我们提出了课程采样强化学习（RLCS）以释放模型的全部潜力，从而在包括 STEM 问题解决、视频理解、内容识别、编码、定位、基于 GUI 的智能体以及长文档解读等多样化任务中实现全面的能力提升。在 42 个公开基准的综合评估中，GLM-4.5V 在几乎所有任务上均达到了同等规模开源模型的最先进性能，并在编码和 GUI 智能体等挑战性任务上展现出与 Gemini-2.5-Flash 等闭源模型竞争甚至更优的结果。同时，较小的 GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 仍然具有很强的竞争力——在 29 个基准上取得了优于更大模型 Qwen2.5-VL-72B 的结果。我们开源了 GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 和 GLM-4.5V。此外，我们推出了 GLM-4.6V 系列，这是具有原生工具使用和 128K 上下文窗口的开源多模态模型。简要概述请访问 https://z.ai/blog/glm-4.6v。代码、模型及更多信息发布在 https://github.com/zai-org/GLM-V。

contrib.en: Proposes GLM-4.1V-Thinking, a VLM for general-purpose multimodal reasoning via a reasoning-centric training framework.
contrib.zh: 提出GLM-4.1V-Thinking，一种通过以推理为核心的训练框架实现通用多模态推理的视觉语言模型。

contrib.en: Introduces Reinforcement Learning with Curriculum Sampling (RLCS) to enhance cross-domain reasoning capabilities.
contrib.zh: 引入带课程采样的强化学习（RLCS），以增强跨领域推理能力。

contrib.en: Open-sources GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking, achieving SOTA among models of similar size and competitive with much larger models.
contrib.zh: 开源GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking，在相似规模模型中达到最优，并与更大模型竞争。

contrib.en: Demonstrates robust cross-domain generalization and mutual facilitation in multi-domain reinforcement learning.
contrib.zh: 展示了多领域强化学习中稳健的跨领域泛化与相互促进。

contrib.en: Develops a comprehensive, precise reward system for multi-domain RL, addressing reward hacking and domain-specific verification.
contrib.zh: 开发了全面、精确的多领域强化学习奖励系统，解决了奖励欺骗和领域特定验证问题。

contrib.en: Achieves superior performance on 23 out of 28 benchmarks among sub-10B models, including STEM, GUI agents, and video understanding.
contrib.zh: 在28个基准测试中，10B以下模型在23项上取得领先，包括STEM、GUI智能体和视频理解。

limits.en: RL enhances task completion but does not consistently improve reasoning quality; correct answers may rely on flawed reasoning.
limits.zh: 强化学习提升了任务完成率，但未能持续改善推理质量；正确答案可能依赖有缺陷的推理。

limits.en: RL training can exhibit instability; minor setup changes lead to substantial variations in reasoning depth or output style.
limits.zh: 强化学习训练可能不稳定；微小设置变化会导致推理深度或输出风格的显著差异。

limits.en: The model struggles with cluttered images, occluded objects, or ambiguous visual details, leading to perceptual errors.
limits.zh: 模型在处理杂乱图像、遮挡物体或模糊视觉细节时存在困难，导致感知错误。

limits.en: Current reward models evaluate final outcomes without assessing intermediate reasoning steps, potentially reinforcing flawed chains.
limits.zh: 当前奖励模型仅评估最终结果而不评估中间推理步骤，可能强化有缺陷的推理链。

limits.en: Mixed-domain RL does not improve grounding or GUI-agent performance as much as single-domain training.
limits.zh: 混合领域强化学习在接地和GUI智能体性能上的提升不如单领域训练。

items.en: We present GLM-4.1V-Thinking, a vision-language model (VLM) designed to advance general-purpose multimodal understanding and reasoning. In this report, we share our key findings in the development of the reasoning-centric training framework. We first develop a capable vision foundation model with significant potential through large-scale pre-training, which arguably sets the upper bound for the final performance. We then propose Reinforcement Learning with Curriculum Sampling (RLCS) to unlock the full potential of the model, leading to comprehensive capability enhancement across a diverse range of tasks, including STEM problem solving, video understanding, content recognition, coding, grounding, GUI-based agents, and long document understanding. We open-source GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking, which achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of comparable size. In a comprehensive evaluation across 28 public benchmarks, our model outperforms Qwen2.5-VL-7B on nearly all tasks and achieves comparable or even superior performance on 18 benchmarks relative to the significantly larger Qwen2.5-VL-72B. Notably, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking also demonstrates competitive or superior performance compared to closed-source models such as GPT-4o on challenging tasks including long document understanding and STEM reasoning, further underscoring its strong capabilities. Code, models and more information are released at https://github.com/THUDM/GLM-4.1V-Thinking.
items.zh: 我们提出了GLM-4.1V-Thinking，这是一种视觉语言模型（VLM），旨在推进通用多模态理解与推理。在本报告中，我们分享了在以推理为中心的训练框架开发过程中的关键发现。我们首先通过大规模预训练开发了一个具有显著潜力的强大视觉基础模型，这可以说是最终性能的上限。然后，我们提出了基于课程采样的强化学习（RLCS）来释放模型的全部潜力，从而在包括STEM问题求解、视频理解、内容识别、编码、定位、基于GUI的智能体和长文档理解在内的多样化任务中实现全面的能力提升。我们开源了GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking，它在同等规模模型中达到了最先进的性能。在28个公开基准的综合评估中，我们的模型在几乎所有任务上优于Qwen2.5-VL-7B，并在18个基准上相对于显著更大的Qwen2.5-VL-72B达到了相当甚至更优的性能。值得注意的是，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking在长文档理解和STEM推理等具有挑战性的任务上也表现出与GPT-4o等闭源模型竞争甚至更优的性能，进一步凸显了其强大能力。代码、模型和更多信息发布在https://github.com/THUDM/GLM-4.1V-Thinking。

items.capEn: Figure 1: (A) GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking matches or outperforms the much larger Qwen2.5-VL-72B and the closed-source GPT-4o across a range of tasks. (B) Reinforcement learning substantially boosts the model’s performance, with gains of up to +7.3%.
items.capZh: 图1：(A) GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking在一系列任务上匹配或优于更大的Qwen2.5-VL-72B和闭源GPT-4o。(B) 强化学习显著提升了模型性能，增益高达+7.3%。

items.en: Vision-language models (VLMs) have become a crucial cornerstone of modern intelligent systems, enabling the perception and understanding of visual information beyond text. Over the past decade, as the intelligence level of models has advanced dramatically [31; 41; 17; 3], the complexity of corresponding multimodal intelligence tasks has increased accordingly. From solving scientific problems [53; 27; 29] to developing autonomous agents [18; 49; 37], the demands on VLMs have far surpassed simple visual content perception [26], with an increasing emphasis on advanced reasoning capabilities. Recently, numerous studies have shown that long-form reasoning [48] and scalable reinforcement learning [36] can significantly enhance the ability of large language models (LLMs) to solve complex problems [20; 14]. Several previous works have attempted to enhance the reasoning capabilities of VLMs using similar paradigms [40; 28], but they mainly focus on specific domains. The open-source community currently also lacks a multimodal reasoning model that consistently outperforms traditional non-thinking models of comparable parameter scale across a broad range of tasks.
items.zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）已成为现代智能系统的关键基石，使得对文本之外的视觉信息的感知和理解成为可能。在过去十年中，随着模型智能水平的显著提升[31; 41; 17; 3]，相应多模态智能任务的复杂性也随之增加。从解决科学问题[53; 27; 29]到开发自主智能体[18; 49; 37]，对VLM的需求已远超简单的视觉内容感知[26]，越来越强调高级推理能力。最近，大量研究表明，长形式推理[48]和可扩展的强化学习[36]可以显著增强大型语言模型（LLM）解决复杂问题的能力[20; 14]。一些先前的工作尝试使用类似范式增强VLM的推理能力[40; 28]，但它们主要关注特定领域。开源社区目前也缺乏一个在广泛任务上持续优于同等参数规模传统非思考模型的多模态推理模型。

items.en: In this report, we share our key findings in the development of GLM-4.1V-Thinking, a vision-language model (VLM) designed to advance general-purpose multimodal reasoning. Our training framework is structured around a unified objective: to comprehensively enhance the model’s reasoning capabilities through scalable reinforcement learning. For pre-training, we curate a broad and diverse corpus of knowledge-intensive multimodal data to equip the model with strong foundational capabilities, including (a) massive image-text pairs with accurate factual knowledge; (b) a self-curated academic corpus with interleaved image and text; (c) annotated documents and diagrams, instructional videos, and grounding data spanning both natural and synthetic images. This foundation model serves as a high-potential multimodal reasoning base for subsequent reinforcement learning. In the supervised fine-tuning phase, we construct carefully designed, domain-specific datasets that teach the model to perform effective reasoning with a standardized format across a wide range of tasks. Finally, we introduce Reinforcement Learning with Curriculum Sampling (RLCS) to drive large-scale, cross-domain reasoning capabilities. RLCS is a multi-domain reinforcement learning framework that combines curriculum learning with difficulty-aware sampling to improve training efficiency by selecting tasks and samples suited to the model’s current competence. Our reinforcement learning process enhances training effectiveness and stability, and systematically improves the model’s reasoning abilities through interaction and feedback across diverse domains.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们分享了在开发GLM-4.1V-Thinking过程中的关键发现，这是一种旨在推进通用多模态推理的视觉语言模型（VLM）。我们的训练框架围绕一个统一目标构建：通过可扩展的强化学习全面增强模型的推理能力。对于预训练，我们策划了一个广泛且多样化的知识密集型多模态数据语料库，以赋予模型强大的基础能力，包括(a) 具有准确事实知识的大规模图像-文本对；(b) 自策的包含交错图像和文本的学术语料库；(c) 注释文档和图表、教学视频以及涵盖自然和合成图像的定位数据。这个基础模型作为后续强化学习的高潜力多模态推理基础。在监督微调阶段，我们构建了精心设计的、特定领域的数据集，教会模型以标准化格式在广泛任务中进行有效推理。最后，我们引入了基于课程采样的强化学习（RLCS）来驱动大规模、跨领域的推理能力。RLCS是一个多领域强化学习框架，结合了课程学习和难度感知采样，通过选择适合模型当前能力的任务和样本来提高训练效率。我们的强化学习过程增强了训练效果和稳定性，并通过跨不同领域的交互和反馈系统地提升了模型的推理能力。

items.en: To advance research in this field, we open-source GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking, which achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of comparable size. In a comprehensive evaluation across 28 public benchmarks, our model outperforms Qwen2.5-VL-7B on nearly all tasks, and achieves comparable or even superior performance on 18 benchmarks relative to the significantly larger Qwen2.5-VL-72B. For example, our model achieves 85.8 on MMBenchV11-EN, 72.9 on MMStar, and 87.9 on AI2D, surpassing both Qwen2.5-VL-72B and other baselines. In particularly challenging areas such as MMMU-Pro and ChartMuseum, it outperforms even 72B-scale models by 6.0 and 9.2 points, respectively. On long document understanding, it scores 42.4 vs. 35.2 (Qwen2.5-VL-72B), exhibiting strong multi-page document reading and reasoning abilities. It also leads on multimodal agent (WebQuest-SingleQA: 72.1 vs. 60.5) and coding tasks (Flame-VLM-Code: 72.5 vs. 46.3). Notably, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking also demonstrates competitive or superior performance compared to closed-source models such as GPT-4o on challenging tasks including long document understanding and STEM reasoning, further underscoring its strong capabilities, such as MMStar (72.9 vs. 66.2), MUIRBENCH (74.7 vs. 69.7), and MathVista (80.7 vs. 64.0). We also open-source the pre-trained base model, GLM-4.1V-9B-Base, to provide a strong foundation for all researchers to develop and extend their own models.
items.zh: 为了推进该领域的研究，我们开源了GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking，它在同等规模模型中达到了最先进的性能。在28个公开基准的综合评估中，我们的模型在几乎所有任务上优于Qwen2.5-VL-7B，并在18个基准上相对于显著更大的Qwen2.5-VL-72B达到了相当甚至更优的性能。例如，我们的模型在MMBenchV11-EN上达到85.8，在MMStar上达到72.9，在AI2D上达到87.9，超过了Qwen2.5-VL-72B和其他基线。在MMMU-Pro和ChartMuseum等特别具有挑战性的领域，它甚至分别以6.0和9.2分的优势超过了72B规模的模型。在长文档理解上，它得分为42.4对35.2（Qwen2.5-VL-72B），展示了强大的多页文档阅读和推理能力。它还在多模态智能体（WebQuest-SingleQA: 72.1对60.5）和编码任务（Flame-VLM-Code: 72.5对46.3）上领先。值得注意的是，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking在长文档理解和STEM推理等具有挑战性的任务上也表现出与GPT-4o等闭源模型竞争甚至更优的性能，进一步凸显了其强大能力，例如MMStar（72.9对66.2）、MUIRBENCH（74.7对69.7）和MathVista（80.7对64.0）。我们还开源了预训练基础模型GLM-4.1V-9B-Base，为所有研究人员开发和扩展自己的模型提供了坚实基础。

items.en: We summarize some of our key findings from the development process below and provide more detailed explanations in the following sections.
items.zh: 我们在下面总结了开发过程中的一些关键发现，并在后续章节中提供更详细的解释。

items.en: Multi-domain reinforcement learning demonstrates robust cross-domain generalization and mutual facilitation. Training on one domain boosts performance in others, and joint training across domains yields even greater improvements in each. (See Section 6.3)
items.zh: 多领域强化学习展示了鲁棒的跨领域泛化和相互促进。在一个领域上的训练提升了其他领域的性能，而跨领域的联合训练在每个领域上带来了更大的改进。（见第6.3节）

items.en: Dynamically selecting the most informative rollout problems is essential for both efficiency and performance. Therefore, we propose strategies including Reinforcement Learning with Curriculum Sampling (RLCS) and dynamic sampling expansion via ratio-based Exponential Moving Average (EMA). (See Section 5.3)
items.zh: 动态选择最具信息量的展开问题对于效率和性能都至关重要。因此，我们提出了包括基于课程采样的强化学习（RLCS）和通过基于比率的指数移动平均（EMA）进行动态采样扩展的策略。（见第5.3节）

items.en: A robust and precise reward system is critical for multi-domain RL. When training a unified VLM across diverse skills, even a slight weakness in the reward signal for one capability can collapse the entire process. (See Section 5.2)
items.zh: 一个鲁棒且精确的奖励系统对于多领域强化学习至关重要。当训练一个统一VLM跨越不同技能时，即使奖励信号对一个能力的轻微弱点也可能导致整个过程的崩溃。（见第5.2节）

items.en: In summary, our contributions are as follows:
items.zh: 总之，我们的贡献如下：

items.en: We present GLM-4.1V-Thinking, a VLM designed to advance general-purpose multimodal reasoning. We introduce the model design and the reasoning-centric training framework, along with key insights and challenges encountered during the development process.
items.zh: 我们提出了GLM-4.1V-Thinking，这是一种旨在推进通用多模态推理的VLM。我们介绍了模型设计和以推理为中心的训练框架，以及开发过程中遇到的关键见解和挑战。

items.en: We open-source the reasoning model GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking, the pre-trained foundation model GLM-4.1V-9B-Base, and other useful components such as domain-specific reward systems, to facilitate research in this area. Code, models and more information are released at https://github.com/THUDM/GLM-4.1V-Thinking.
items.zh: 我们开源了推理模型GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking、预训练基础模型GLM-4.1V-9B-Base以及其他有用组件（如特定领域的奖励系统），以促进该领域的研究。代码、模型和更多信息发布在https://github.com/THUDM/GLM-4.1V-Thinking。

items.en: Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of its size and is even comparable to much larger models on numerous benchmarks.
items.zh: 全面的实验证明了所提出模型的优越性：GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking在其规模模型中达到了最先进的性能，并且在许多基准上甚至与更大的模型相当。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The architecture of GLM-4.1V-Thinking. The proposed model consists of three components: (1) a ViT Encoder to process and encode images and videos, (2) an MLP Projector to align visual features to tokens, (3) a Large Language Model as a Language Decoder to process multimodal tokens and yield token completions. GLM-4.1V-Thinking can perceive images and videos as their native resolutions and aspect ratios. For video inputs, additional time index tokens are inserted behind each frame to enhance the model’s temporal understanding capability.
items.capZh: 图2：GLM-4.1V-Thinking的架构。所提出的模型由三个组件组成：(1) 一个ViT编码器，用于处理和编码图像和视频；(2) 一个MLP投影器，用于将视觉特征对齐到词元；(3) 一个大型语言模型作为语言解码器，用于处理多模态词元并生成词元补全。GLM-4.1V-Thinking可以以其原始分辨率和宽高比感知图像和视频。对于视频输入，在每帧后面插入额外的时间索引词元，以增强模型的时间理解能力。

items.en: To support arbitrary image resolutions and aspect ratios, we introduce two adaptations. First, we integrate 2D-RoPE [38], enabling the model to effectively process images with extreme aspect ratios (over 200:1) or high resolutions (beyond 4K). Second, to preserve the foundational capabilities of the pre-trained ViT, we retain its original learnable absolute position embeddings. During training, these embeddings are dynamically adapted to variable-resolution inputs via bicubic interpolation. Specifically, for an input image divided into a grid of Hp×WpH_{p}\times W_{p} patches, the integer coordinates 𝐠=(w,h)\mathbf{g}=(w,h) of each patch are first normalized to a continuous grid 𝐠norm\mathbf{g}_{\text{norm}} spanning [−1,1][-1,1]:
items.zh: 为了支持任意图像分辨率和宽高比，我们引入了两个适配。首先，我们集成了2D-RoPE [38]，使模型能够有效处理极端宽高比（超过200:1）或高分辨率（超过4K）的图像。其次，为了保留预训练ViT的基础能力，我们保留了其原始的可学习绝对位置嵌入。在训练过程中，这些嵌入通过双三次插值动态适配到可变分辨率输入。具体来说，对于输入图像被划分为Hp×Wp个块的网格，每个块的整数坐标𝐠=(w,h)首先被归一化到连续网格𝐠norm，范围在[−1,1]：

items.en: These normalized coordinates are then used to sample from the original position embedding table PorigP_{\text{orig}} using a bicubic interpolation function ℐbicubic\mathcal{I}_{\text{bicubic}} to generate the final adapted embedding PadaptedP_{\text{adapted}} for that patch:
items.zh: 然后，这些归一化坐标用于使用双三次插值函数ℐbicubic从原始位置嵌入表Porig中采样，以生成该块的最终适配嵌入Padapted：

items.en: To further enhance spatial awareness on the language side, we extend RoPE to 3D-RoPE in the LLM. This extension provides superior spatial understanding for multimodal contexts, while preserving the original model’s text-based capabilities.
items.zh: 为了进一步增强语言侧的空间感知，我们将RoPE扩展到LLM中的3D-RoPE。这种扩展为多模态上下文提供了卓越的空间理解，同时保留了原始模型的基于文本的能力。

items.en: After addressing spatial adaptation, we turn to temporal modeling in video inputs. For videos, we insert a time index token after each frame token, where the time index is implemented by encoding each frame’s timestamp as a string. Unlike multi-image inputs, video frames form a temporally coherent sequence. This design explicitly informs the model of the real-world timestamps and temporal distances between frames, thereby boosting its temporal understanding and grounding capabilities.
items.zh: 在解决空间适配之后，我们转向视频输入中的时间建模。对于视频，我们在每帧词元后插入一个时间索引词元，其中时间索引通过将每帧的时间戳编码为字符串来实现。与多图像输入不同，视频帧形成一个时间上连贯的序列。这种设计明确告知模型帧之间的真实时间戳和时间距离，从而提升其时间理解和定位能力。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparison of pass@k performance on a subset of MathVista consisting of non-multiple-choice questions.
items.capZh: 图3：在MathVista子集（由非多项选择题组成）上的pass@k性能比较。

items.en: To develop a more powerful visual language foundation model, we are incorporating a diverse range of datasets, including extensive academic corpora and knowledge-rich, interleaved image-text data, while also training the model on pure text data to preserve its language capabilities.
items.zh: 为了开发更强大的视觉语言基础模型，我们正在整合多样化的数据集，包括广泛的学术语料库和知识丰富的交错图像-文本数据，同时也在纯文本数据上训练模型以保持其语言能力。

items.en: As shown in Figure 3, GLM-4.1V-9B-Base achieves significantly better results on the pass@k metric compared with the state-of-the-art pre-trained base model of similar scale. This superior base performance arguably sets the upper bound for the final results after reinforcement learning (RL).
items.zh: 如图3所示，GLM-4.1V-9B-Base在pass@k指标上取得了显著优于同类规模最先进预训练基座模型的结果。这种优越的基座性能可以说为强化学习（RL）后的最终结果设定了上限。

items.en: Below, we first describe the construction of pre-training data and then outline the training procedure.
items.zh: 下面，我们首先描述预训练数据的构建，然后概述训练流程。

items.en: Image caption data. High-quality image-text captions are crucial for imbuing visual-language models with world knowledge and enhancing their generalization capabilities. To this end, we construct a large-scale, high-quality caption dataset through a meticulous curation pipeline. The process begins with the aggregation of an initial pool of over 10 billion image-text pairs from diverse sources, including public datasets like LAION[34], DataComp [10], DFN[6], and Wukong [12], supplemented by data from web search engines. To ensure data integrity, we implement a multi-stage refinement process:
items.zh: 图像描述数据。高质量的图像-文本描述对于赋予视觉语言模型世界知识并增强其泛化能力至关重要。为此，我们通过一个精心设计的筛选流程构建了一个大规模、高质量的描述数据集。该过程首先从多种来源聚合超过100亿个图像-文本对的初始池，包括LAION[34]、DataComp[10]、DFN[6]和Wukong[12]等公开数据集，并辅以来自网络搜索引擎的数据。为确保数据完整性，我们实施了一个多阶段的精炼流程：

items.en: Heuristic-based filtering: We first apply a series of rule-based filters to discard overtly low-quality samples. These rules include minimum image resolution, solid color detection, caption length constraints, and image-level deduplication.
items.zh: 基于启发式的过滤：我们首先应用一系列基于规则的过滤器来丢弃明显低质量的样本。这些规则包括最小图像分辨率、纯色检测、描述长度约束和图像级去重。

items.en: Relevance filtering: To enforce semantic consistency between modalities, we employ a pre-trained CLIP model to calculate image-text similarity, retaining only pairs with a CLIP-Score above a threshold of 0.3.
items.zh: 相关性过滤：为了强制模态之间的语义一致性，我们采用预训练的CLIP模型计算图像-文本相似度，仅保留CLIP分数高于阈值0.3的配对。

items.en: Concept-balanced resampling: To mitigate the inherent long-tail distribution of concepts in web-scale data, we adopt a resampling strategy inspired by MetaCLIP [50]. Using a comprehensive vocabulary rich in visual concepts and proper nouns, we re-weight the filtered data to enhance conceptual coverage and balance.
items.zh: 概念平衡重采样：为了缓解网络规模数据中概念固有的长尾分布，我们采用受MetaCLIP[50]启发的重采样策略。使用一个富含视觉概念和专有名词的综合词汇表，我们对过滤后的数据进行重新加权，以增强概念覆盖和平衡。

items.en: Factual-centered recaptioning: Furthermore, to improve the descriptive quality and information density of the captions, we iteratively train a factual-centered recaptioning model. As shown in Figure 4, this model is designed to denoise and enrich the original captions, generating new, more precise, and detailed descriptions while preserving the factual accuracy of the source text.
items.zh: 以事实为中心的重述：此外，为了提高描述的描述质量和信息密度，我们迭代训练了一个以事实为中心的重述模型。如图4所示，该模型旨在对原始描述进行去噪和丰富，生成更精确、更详细的新描述，同时保留源文本的事实准确性。

items.en: For the final training set, we blend the curated original data with the recaptioned data at a specific ratio, creating a final dataset that balances the breadth of world knowledge with descriptive depth.
items.zh: 对于最终的训练集，我们将筛选后的原始数据与重述数据按特定比例混合，创建一个在知识广度与描述深度之间取得平衡的最终数据集。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Examples of recaption model results. The recaptioning process eliminates noise and hallucinated content from the original data, while fully retaining factual knowledge.
items.capZh: 图4：重述模型结果示例。重述过程消除了原始数据中的噪声和幻觉内容，同时完全保留了事实知识。

items.en: Interleaved image-text data. Rich interleaved image-text vision-language data can be found in corpora such as web pages and books. On the one hand, its volume is immense, far exceeding that of existing image-caption datasets which rely primarily on alt-text. On the other hand, it encodes rich information beyond simple image descriptions, including complex logical relationships between text and images and covering a broad spectrum of domain knowledge. However, such data is often extremely noisy: many samples lack genuine image-text alignment, and the distribution of information density is highly skewed (a large fraction of the corpus is uninformative). As a result, prior work seldom leverages these resources at scale to boost vision-language capabilities, typically only using small amounts to help models adapt to multi-image, interleaved-text layouts. To address this, we design and implement specialized processing pipelines tailored to each data source, successfully extracting a large volume of high-quality interleaved image-text data and substantially enhancing the model’s foundational image-text understanding and reasoning abilities. The specific pipelines are as follows:
items.zh: 交错图像-文本数据。丰富的交错图像-文本视觉语言数据可以在网页和书籍等语料库中找到。一方面，其数量巨大，远远超过主要依赖替代文本的现有图像描述数据集。另一方面，它编码了超越简单图像描述的丰富信息，包括文本和图像之间的复杂逻辑关系，并涵盖了广泛的领域知识。然而，此类数据通常极其嘈杂：许多样本缺乏真正的图像-文本对齐，信息密度分布高度偏斜（语料库的很大一部分信息量低）。因此，先前的工作很少大规模利用这些资源来增强视觉语言能力，通常仅使用少量数据来帮助模型适应多图像、交错文本布局。为了解决这个问题，我们针对每个数据源设计并实现了专门的流水线，成功提取了大量高质量的交错图像-文本数据，并显著增强了模型的基础图像-文本理解和推理能力。具体流水线如下：

items.en: Web data processing pipeline: Our pipeline for web data begins with the aggregation of raw content from large-scale open-source datasets, including MINT [2], MMC4 [58], and OmniCorpus [24]. This initial pool undergoes a multi-stage cleaning and filtering process. First, we discard images that are semantically irrelevant to the surrounding article context using a CLIP-Score threshold. We then remove common noise elements like advertisements and QR codes, which are typically located at the end of articles, using a combination of heuristic rules and a purpose-built image classifier for enhanced precision. Furthermore, we exclude samples characterized by a high density of images but sparse textual content, such as online photo albums. To actively enrich the dataset with high-information-value content, we iteratively train a “high-knowledge-density” image classifier. This model is engineered to identify and prioritize images of significant informational value, such as academic charts, scientific illustrations, engineering schematics, instructional diagrams, and maps.
items.zh: 网页数据处理流水线：我们的网页数据流水线首先从大规模开源数据集聚合原始内容，包括MINT [2]、MMC4 [58]和OmniCorpus [24]。这个初始池经过多阶段清洗和过滤过程。首先，我们使用CLIP分数阈值丢弃与周围文章上下文语义无关的图像。然后，我们使用启发式规则和专门构建的图像分类器（以提高精度）的组合，移除常见的噪声元素，如广告和二维码，这些通常位于文章末尾。此外，我们排除图像密度高但文本内容稀疏的样本，例如在线相册。为了主动丰富数据集中的高信息价值内容，我们迭代训练了一个“高知识密度”图像分类器。该模型旨在识别和优先处理具有重要信息价值的图像，例如学术图表、科学插图、工程示意图、教学图解和地图。

items.en: Academic book processing pipeline: As another core data source, we collect over 100 million digitized books. To ensure content relevance and quality, we first filter this collection to select books pertaining to key domains, including science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM). Subsequently, we employ a PDF parsing tool to perform a deep parsing of these PDF documents, enabling the extraction of high-quality interleaved image-and-text content.
items.zh: 学术书籍处理流水线：作为另一个核心数据源，我们收集了超过1亿本数字化书籍。为确保内容相关性和质量，我们首先过滤该集合，选择关键领域的书籍，包括科学、技术、工程和数学（STEM）。随后，我们使用PDF解析工具对这些PDF文档进行深度解析，从而提取高质量的交错图像和文本内容。

items.en: OCR data. To bolster the model’s OCR capabilities, we construct a large-scale pre-training dataset comprising 220 million images. This dataset is meticulously composed of three distinct components, each designed to address a specific aspect of text recognition:
items.zh: OCR数据。为了增强模型的OCR能力，我们构建了一个包含2.2亿张图像的大规模预训练数据集。该数据集由三个不同的组成部分精心组成，每个部分旨在解决文本识别的特定方面：

items.en: Synthetic document images: We render text from language pre-training corpora using varied fonts, sizes, colors, and orientations. These rendered texts are then composited onto diverse image backgrounds sourced from the LAION dataset, producing synthetic images that cover a broad spectrum of practical application scenarios.
items.zh: 合成文档图像：我们使用不同的字体、大小、颜色和方向渲染来自语言预训练语料库的文本。然后将这些渲染的文本合成到来自LAION数据集的各种图像背景上，生成覆盖广泛实际应用场景的合成图像。

items.en: Natural scene text images: We utilize the Paddle-OCR toolkit to process a vast collection of natural images, automatically extracting textual content and their corresponding bounding boxes. The resulting data is subsequently filtered to retain only images containing at least one valid OCR detection, thereby enriching the dataset with authentic, real-world text instances.
items.zh: 自然场景文本图像：我们利用Paddle-OCR工具处理大量自然图像，自动提取文本内容及其对应的边界框。随后对结果数据进行过滤，仅保留包含至少一个有效OCR检测的图像，从而用真实的现实世界文本实例丰富数据集。

items.en: Academic documents: We adopt a processing methodology inspired by Nougat [4]. A large corpus of papers is sourced from arXiv, where the LaTeX source code is first normalized and converted to HTML format using the LaTeXML tool. The HTML is then parsed and transformed into a lightweight markup language. Finally, this content is segmented according to the original PDF page breaks and rasterized, creating a high-quality dataset of paired PDF page renderings and their corresponding structured source markup.
items.zh: 学术文档：我们采用受Nougat [4]启发的处理方法。从arXiv获取大量论文语料库，首先使用LaTeXML工具将LaTeX源代码标准化并转换为HTML格式。然后解析HTML并将其转换为轻量级标记语言。最后，根据原始PDF分页符分割此内容并进行光栅化，创建高质量的PDF页面渲染及其对应结构化源标记的配对数据集。

items.en: Grounding data. To endow the model with precise visual localization capabilities, we construct a hybrid grounding dataset spanning two primary domains: natural images and graphical user interfaces (GUIs).
items.zh: 定位数据。为了赋予模型精确的视觉定位能力，我们构建了一个混合定位数据集，涵盖两个主要领域：自然图像和图形用户界面（GUI）。

items.en: Natural image grounding: In the domain of natural images, we utilize LAION-115M [23] as a foundational dataset. Leveraging the GLIPv2 [55] model, we parse the caption of each image and automatically predict the corresponding bounding boxes for every noun phrase. To ensure the quality and richness of the grounding data, we apply a filter to retain only those samples containing at least two valid bounding boxes. This pipeline results in a final dataset of 40 million high-quality grounding annotations for natural images.
items.zh: 自然图像定位：在自然图像领域，我们使用LAION-115M [23]作为基础数据集。利用GLIPv2 [55]模型，解析每张图像的描述，并自动预测每个名词短语对应的边界框。为确保定位数据的质量和丰富性，我们应用过滤器仅保留包含至少两个有效边界框的样本。该流水线最终产生4000万个高质量的自然图像定位标注。

items.en: GUI grounding: For the GUI domain, we construct a novel, large-scale dataset from scratch. We begin by extracting URLs from a recent CommonCrawl snapshot and capturing corresponding webpage screenshots via automated tools. Going beyond static captures, we employ the Playwright framework to deeply interact with webpages. This enables us to compile and parse all visible DOM elements along with their precisely rendered bounding boxes on the page. In general, to enhance the model’s interactive and comprehension abilities within GUI environments, we generate over 140 million question-answer pairs for Referring Expression Generation and Comprehension tasks specific to GUIs.
items.zh: GUI定位：对于GUI领域，我们从头构建了一个新颖的大规模数据集。我们首先从最近的CommonCrawl快照中提取URL，并通过自动化工具捕获相应的网页截图。超越静态捕获，我们使用Playwright框架与网页进行深度交互。这使我们能够编译和解析所有可见的DOM元素及其在页面上精确渲染的边界框。通常，为了增强模型在GUI环境中的交互和理解能力，我们为GUI特定的指代表达生成和理解任务生成了超过1.4亿个问答对。

items.en: Video data. To support advanced video understanding, we construct a large-scale, high-quality video-text dataset. We curate a diverse corpus from academic, web, and proprietary sources. To address the hallucinations and omissions common in standard captions, we develop a pipeline with fine-grained human annotation to accurately capture complex actions and in-scene text. Furthermore, to encode deeper visual narratives, we annotate key cinematic elements such as camera motion and shot composition using a human-in-the-loop workflow.
items.zh: 视频数据。为了支持高级视频理解，我们构建了一个大规模、高质量的视频-文本数据集。我们从学术、网络和专有来源筛选了一个多样化的语料库。为了解决标准描述中常见的幻觉和遗漏问题，我们开发了一个带有细粒度人工标注的流水线，以准确捕捉复杂动作和场景内文本。此外，为了编码更深的视觉叙事，我们使用人在回路的工作流程标注了关键的电影元素，如摄像机运动和镜头构图。

items.en: To ensure data purity, we implement a rigorous filtering protocol. We begin with integrity checks to remove corrupted or invalid files. Subsequently, we employ a multimodal, embedding-based deduplication strategy, discarding pairs where both video and text embeddings show high similarity to another entry. This process effectively eliminates semantic redundancy, resulting in a clean and efficient training corpus.
items.zh: 为确保数据纯净，我们实施了严格的过滤协议。首先进行完整性检查，移除损坏或无效的文件。随后，采用基于多模态嵌入的去重策略，丢弃视频和文本嵌入均与另一条目高度相似的配对。此过程有效消除了语义冗余，生成了干净高效的训练语料库。

items.en: Instruction tuning data. To enhance model versatility and generalization, we diversify high-quality instruction tuning data. Three targeted strategies are implemented:
items.zh: 指令微调数据。为增强模型的多样性和泛化能力，我们多样化高质量指令微调数据。实施了三种针对性策略：

items.en: Task coverage and taxonomy: We design a fine-grained taxonomy to optimize data sampling for expanded world knowledge coverage. This taxonomy allows us to organize prompts according to their semantic structure and task objective, enabling category-specific preprocessing and balanced sampling strategies.
items.zh: 任务覆盖与分类：我们设计了一个细粒度分类法，以优化数据采样，扩大世界知识覆盖。该分类法使我们能够根据语义结构和任务目标组织提示，实现类别特定的预处理和平衡采样策略。

items.en: Complex scenario augmentation: To address gaps in existing open-source datasets (e.g., GUI interactions, long-document comprehension), we integrate synthetically generated data with rigorous structural constraints. These methods help us expand the dataset in diverse areas and improve its overall complexity.
items.zh: 复杂场景增强：为解决现有开源数据集（如GUI交互、长文档理解）中的空白，我们整合了具有严格结构约束的合成数据。这些方法帮助我们在不同领域扩展数据集，并提高其整体复杂性。

items.en: Data contamination check: To prevent data leakage from public evaluation benchmarks, we conduct both manual and automated reviews of all open-source datasets.
items.zh: 数据污染检查：为防止公共评估基准的数据泄露，我们对所有开源数据集进行了人工和自动审查。

items.en: The resulting 50 million samples include general visual perception and understanding, multimodal reasoning (e.g., STEM problem-solving), document-intensive contexts, GUI agent operations, and UI coding. It provides comprehensive coverage for the full-scenario reinforcement learning pipeline.
items.zh: 最终得到的5000万样本包括通用视觉感知与理解、多模态推理（如STEM问题求解）、文档密集型场景、GUI智能体操作和UI编码。它为全场景强化学习流水线提供了全面覆盖。

items.en: Our model’s training is conducted in two sequential stages: multimodal pre-training and long-context continual training.
items.zh: 我们模型的训练分两个连续阶段进行：多模态预训练和长上下文持续训练。

items.en: Multimodal pre-training. The initial stage aims to build a strong foundation of general multimodal capabilities. We train all model parameters for 120,000 steps using a 2-way tensor parallelism strategy. The training utilizes a sequence length of 8,192 and a global batch size of 1,536. The dataset for this stage consists of a carefully curated mixture of all data modalities described in Section˜3.1, with the exception of video. To maximize computational efficiency, we employ a data packing strategy where multiple variable-length samples are concatenated into single sequences approaching the maximum length.
items.zh: 多模态预训练。初始阶段旨在建立通用多模态能力的坚实基础。我们使用2路张量并行策略训练所有模型参数120,000步。训练采用序列长度8,192和全局批次大小1,536。此阶段的数据集由第3.1节所述的所有数据模态（视频除外）的精心策划混合组成。为最大化计算效率，我们采用数据打包策略，将多个可变长度样本拼接成接近最大长度的单个序列。

items.en: Long-context continual training. Following pre-training, we perform a continual training stage to extend the model’s capabilities to high-resolution imagery, video, and extended contexts. We augment the training data with video inputs and long-sequence interleaved data exceeding 8k tokens. To accommodate these longer inputs, we increase the sequence length to 32,768 and adopt a hybrid parallelism approach, combining 2-way tensor parallelism with 4-way context parallelism. This stage is run for an additional 10,000 steps, while maintaining the global batch size of 1,536.
items.zh: 长上下文持续训练。预训练之后，我们进行持续训练阶段，将模型能力扩展到高分辨率图像、视频和长上下文。我们使用视频输入和超过8k token的长序列交错数据增强训练数据。为适应这些更长的输入，我们将序列长度增加到32,768，并采用混合并行方法，结合2路张量并行和4路上下文并行。此阶段额外运行10,000步，同时保持全局批次大小1,536。

items.en: The supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage functions as a bridge to reinforcement learning, transforming a base vision-language model (VLM) into one capable of long chain-of-thought (CoT) inference. Our long-CoT corpus is carefully curated to enhance reasoning style and human alignment, spanning both verifiable domains (e.g., STEM problems) and non-verifiable tasks (e.g., instruction following, open-ended writing). Unlike prior workflows [47; 17; 13] that apply SFT to short CoT data, we deliberately omit this step: rather than injecting new knowledge, we view SFT’s role as aligning the model’s existing vision-language understanding with a more effective thinking and response style. This alignment primes the model for a stronger cold start, enabling more efficient and stable reinforcement learning in the next phase.
items.zh: 监督微调（SFT）阶段作为强化学习的桥梁，将基础视觉语言模型（VLM）转变为能够进行长思维链（CoT）推理的模型。我们的长CoT语料库经过精心策划，以增强推理风格和人类对齐，涵盖可验证领域（如STEM问题）和不可验证任务（如指令遵循、开放式写作）。与先前工作[47; 17; 13]对短CoT数据应用SFT不同，我们有意省略此步骤：我们不注入新知识，而是将SFT的作用视为将模型现有的视觉语言理解与更有效的思考和响应风格对齐。这种对齐为模型提供了更强的冷启动，使下一阶段的强化学习更高效、更稳定。

items.en: To facilitate subsequent reinforcement learning, we curate a high-quality dataset of long CoT reasoning examples. This dataset is designed to train models to produce coherent, multi-step solutions in a standardized format, thereby underpinning stable and scalable RL training.
items.zh: 为促进后续强化学习，我们策划了一个高质量的长CoT推理示例数据集。该数据集旨在训练模型以标准化格式生成连贯的多步骤解决方案，从而支撑稳定且可扩展的RL训练。

items.en: Data composition. Our reasoning dataset spans a wide spectrum of domains, with a primary focus on verifiable tasks whose outcomes can be rigorously assessed and refined via reinforcement learning. We also include non-verifiable tasks, such as open-ended visual question answering, to broaden and strengthen the model’s general reasoning capabilities across diverse contexts. The dataset is primarily composed of data in Chinese and English, with a small proportion in other languages. We employ our pre-trained model to filter out instances that are either too easy or excessively hard, maintaining a moderate overall difficulty level suitable for training.
items.zh: 数据组成。我们的推理数据集涵盖广泛领域，主要关注可通过强化学习严格评估和改进的可验证任务。我们还包括不可验证任务，如开放式视觉问答，以拓宽和增强模型在不同场景下的通用推理能力。数据集主要由中文和英文数据组成，少量其他语言。我们使用预训练模型过滤掉过易或过难的实例，保持适中的整体难度水平，适合训练。

items.en: Response formatting. Each response follows a standardized structure:
items.zh: 响应格式化。每个响应遵循标准化结构：

items.en: The <think> part captures the model’s reasoning process, including strategies such as reflection, backtracking, retrying, and verification. The <answer> part presents a concise, complete and logically sound solution. For verifiable tasks with a specific final answer, the final result in the <answer> part is required to be wrapped with <|begin_of_box|> and <|end_of_box|>, and only one boxed span is acceptable. This annotation facilitates more accurate answer extraction during the RL phase. Note that we include <think>, </think>, <answer>, </answer>, <|begin_of_box|>, <|end_of_box|> to the tokenizer’s vocabulary as special tokens to facilitate easier and accurate online parsing.
items.zh: <think>部分捕捉模型的推理过程，包括反思、回溯、重试和验证等策略。<answer>部分呈现简洁、完整且逻辑合理的解决方案。对于具有特定最终答案的可验证任务，<answer>部分中的最终结果需要用<|begin_of_box|>和<|end_of_box|>包裹，且只接受一个框内跨度。这种标注有助于在RL阶段更准确地提取答案。注意，我们将<think>、</think>、<answer>、</answer>、<|begin_of_box|>、<|end_of_box|>作为特殊标记添加到分词器词汇表中，以便于更轻松、准确的在线解析。

items.en: Response curation. The quality of the cold-start dataset is critical to the stability of RL training. In practice, we find that poorly constructed data can lead to training instability or even collapse. To mitigate this, we implement a rigorous data cleaning pipeline. This process enforces strict adherence to formatting conventions (e.g., correct usage of <think> and <answer> tags) and removes examples with inconsistent or noisy reasoning styles. Also, we filter out responses containing mixed-language phrasing or redundant thought patterns.
items.zh: 响应策划。冷启动数据集的质量对RL训练的稳定性至关重要。实践中，我们发现构建不良的数据可能导致训练不稳定甚至崩溃。为缓解此问题，我们实施了严格的数据清洗流水线。此过程强制严格遵守格式约定（例如正确使用<think>和<answer>标签），并移除具有不一致或嘈杂推理风格的示例。此外，我们过滤掉包含混合语言措辞或冗余思维模式的响应。

items.en: Iterative data enhancement. To improve the quality and challenge level of the cold-start dataset, we incorporate high-quality and informative examples sampled from RL checkpoints back into the cold-start dataset. This iterative enhancement helps expose the model to more useful reasoning patterns discovered during RL, and can provide a stronger foundation for subsequent rounds of RL training.
items.zh: 迭代数据增强。为提高冷启动数据集的质量和挑战水平，我们将从RL检查点采样的高质量和信息丰富的示例重新纳入冷启动数据集。这种迭代增强有助于模型暴露于RL过程中发现的有用推理模式，并为后续RL训练提供更强的基础。

items.en: We perform full-parameter fine-tuning with a sequence length of 32,768 tokens and a global batch size of 32. The training corpus includes the long-form reasoning data described in §4.1, spanning multiple domains. In addition to multimodal data, we also incorporate high-quality text-only long-form examples covering math problem solving, multi-turn conversation, agent planning, and instruction following. These examples help preserve the model’s core language understanding and general reasoning abilities throughout multimodal fine-tuning.
items.zh: 我们使用序列长度32,768 token和全局批次大小32进行全参数微调。训练语料库包括第4.1节所述的长形式推理数据，涵盖多个领域。除多模态数据外，我们还整合了高质量纯文本长形式示例，涵盖数学问题求解、多轮对话、智能体规划和指令遵循。这些示例有助于在多模态微调过程中保持模型的核心语言理解和通用推理能力。

items.en: Interestingly, we observe that even when cold-start training uses noisy reasoning data, which contain formatting inconsistencies or repetitive patterns, subsequent RL remains effective. This suggests that imperfect reasoning traces can still provide useful guidance. Nonetheless, models initialized with clean and consistent data show more stable RL convergence and achieve higher overall performance.
items.zh: 有趣的是，我们观察到即使冷启动训练使用包含格式不一致或重复模式的嘈杂推理数据，后续RL仍然有效。这表明不完美的推理轨迹仍能提供有用的指导。尽管如此，使用干净一致数据初始化的模型表现出更稳定的RL收敛，并达到更高的整体性能。

full.sec: 5 Reinforcement Learning: What’s Challenging and What Works
full.secZh: 5 强化学习：挑战与有效方法

items.en: After the supervised fine-tuning phase, we primarily rely on reinforcement learning (RL) to enhance the model’s performance. We employ a combination of Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) and Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) to conduct large-scale RL across all multimodal domains and capabilities, including STEM problem solving (such as mathematics, physics, chemistry), grounding, optical character recognition (OCR), video understanding, GUI agents, chart and document understanding, logical reasoning, and instruction following.
items.zh: 监督微调阶段之后，我们主要依赖强化学习（RL）来提升模型性能。我们结合使用可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）和基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF），在所有多模态领域和能力上进行大规模RL，包括STEM问题求解（如数学、物理、化学）、接地、光学字符识别（OCR）、视频理解、GUI智能体、图表和文档理解、逻辑推理和指令遵循。

items.en: Our RL framework comprises the following components:
items.zh: 我们的RL框架包括以下组件：

items.en: Data preparation: Define sub-tasks in each multimodal domain that are suitable for verifiable rewards (for RLVR) or model-based rewards (for RLHF) as supervision signals, and curate large volumes of high-quality data with appropriate difficulty levels and broad coverage.
items.zh: 数据准备：在每个多模态领域中定义适合可验证奖励（用于RLVR）或基于模型的奖励（用于RLHF）作为监督信号的子任务，并策划大量高质量、难度适当且覆盖广泛的数据。

items.en: Reward system: Precise rewards are the key to RLVR’s effectiveness. When scaling RL across all multimodal domains, it becomes challenging yet critical to assign accurate rewards to as many tasks as possible within each subdomain. We design a multi-domain, unified reward system that shares common evaluation logic while enabling targeted optimization of robust verifiers for each subdomain.
items.zh: 奖励系统：精确的奖励是RLVR有效性的关键。当在所有多模态领域扩展RL时，为每个子领域内尽可能多的任务分配准确的奖励变得具有挑战性但至关重要。我们设计了一个多领域、统一的奖励系统，该系统共享共同的评估逻辑，同时能够针对每个子领域优化稳健的验证器。

items.en: Training: Building on our solid foundation of data and reward system, we meticulously refine our RL training recipes toward improved effectiveness, efficiency and stability. We propose and incorporate improvements including Reinforcement Learning with Curriculum Sampling (RLCS), dynamic sampling expansion with ratio EMA, larger batch size, discarding KL and entropy loss, etc.
items.zh: 训练：在数据和奖励系统的坚实基础上，我们精心优化RL训练方案，以提高有效性、效率和稳定性。我们提出并整合了改进措施，包括基于课程采样的强化学习（RLCS）、动态采样扩展（使用比率EMA）、更大的批量大小、丢弃KL和熵损失等。

items.en: Infrastructure: To efficiently utilize compute resources for large-scale RL training, we develop an in-house high-performance, stable RL infrastructure. It flexibly supports diverse training configurations across multimodal domains (e.g., custom verifiers, data sampling ratios) and incorporates comprehensive optimizations in sampling, training, and beyond.
items.zh: 基础设施：为了高效利用计算资源进行大规模RL训练，我们开发了内部高性能、稳定的RL基础设施。它灵活支持跨多模态领域的多样化训练配置（例如，自定义验证器、数据采样比率），并在采样、训练及其他方面进行了全面优化。

items.en: We find that challenges arise at every layer—from data preparation and reward system to training and infrastructure. Failure in any single dimension can lead to a severe degradation in the efficiency of the RL stage or even its collapse. In this section, we first outline the core workflow of each component, and then share the challenges we encounter during our exploration as well as the best practices we discover.
items.zh: 我们发现挑战存在于每一层——从数据准备和奖励系统到训练和基础设施。任何一个维度的失败都可能导致RL阶段效率严重下降甚至崩溃。在本节中，我们首先概述每个组件的核心工作流程，然后分享我们在探索中遇到的挑战以及发现的最佳实践。

items.en: The objective of data preparation is to select or synthesize as much verifiable data as possible in each subdomain that can be efficiently improved through RL. To this end, we carry out the following stages in sequence.
items.zh: 数据准备的目标是在每个子领域中选择或合成尽可能多的、可通过RL有效改进的可验证数据。为此，我们按顺序执行以下阶段。

items.en: Task identification. We first define a set of candidate tasks for verification in each multimodal subdomain. For example, while video captioning is open-ended and difficult to evaluate strictly, temporal grounding lends itself to clear correctness judgments.
items.zh: 任务识别。我们首先在每个多模态子领域中定义一组用于验证的候选任务。例如，视频字幕是开放式的且难以严格评估，而时间定位则易于进行明确的正确性判断。

items.en: Data curation. We then filter or generate question-answer pairs from these tasks that a verifier can assess with high precision. This process includes converting multiple-choice questions with unique answers into the fill-in-the-blank format to eliminate noise from random guessing during RL.
items.zh: 数据策划。然后，我们从这些任务中过滤或生成验证器能够高精度评估的问答对。这个过程包括将具有唯一答案的多选题转换为填空题格式，以消除RL中随机猜测带来的噪声。

items.en: Quality validation and offline difficulty grading. Next, we carry out thorough correctness checks and run passk evaluations using multiple existing or prior RL models, combining these results with human difficulty labels to achieve fine-grained difficulty grading.
items.zh: 质量验证和离线难度分级。接下来，我们进行彻底的正确性检查，并使用多个现有或先前的RL模型运行passk评估，将这些结果与人工难度标签相结合，以实现细粒度的难度分级。

items.en: Pilot RL experiments. Finally, we perform preliminary RL experiments in each subdomain to confirm the data’s quality and the model’s potential for performance gains.
items.zh: 试点RL实验。最后，我们在每个子领域中进行初步的RL实验，以确认数据的质量和模型性能提升的潜力。

items.en: We establish a reward system compatible with both RLVR and RLHF and tailor it for every multimodal domain. For RLVR tasks, the system first extracts the segment containing the final answer from the rollout outputs, then compares this key answer against the reference answer to determine correctness, and finally returns a reward value in binary (0/1) or continuous form. For RLHF tasks, it directly takes the answer segment of the output and scores it using the reward model.
items.zh: 我们建立了一个兼容RLVR和RLHF的奖励系统，并针对每个多模态领域进行定制。对于RLVR任务，系统首先从模型输出中提取包含最终答案的片段，然后将该关键答案与参考答案进行比较以确定正确性，最后以二进制（0/1）或连续形式返回奖励值。对于RLHF任务，它直接获取输出的答案片段，并使用奖励模型进行评分。

items.en: As its core, reinforcement learning is an optimization process driven by the feedback from the reward system. Therefore, it’s critical to enhance the accuracy and robustness of the reward system. The possibility of assigning precise rewards is also one of the key reasons why RLVR is currently delivering outstanding results. For GLM-4.1V-Thinking, to achieve multimodal reinforcement learning across all domains, we employ a meticulously crafted reward system to supervise every facet of the model’s abilities—visual perception (OCR, grounding), comprehension (document, chart and video understanding), reasoning (academic and logical problem solving), and agent behavior—thereby necessitating the development of a comprehensive, precise, and robust reward system.
items.zh: 作为核心，强化学习是一个由奖励系统反馈驱动的优化过程。因此，提高奖励系统的准确性和鲁棒性至关重要。分配精确奖励的可能性也是RLVR目前取得出色结果的关键原因之一。对于GLM-4.1V-Thinking，为了实现跨所有领域的多模态强化学习，我们采用精心设计的奖励系统来监督模型能力的每一个方面——视觉感知（OCR、定位）、理解（文档、图表和视频理解）、推理（学术和逻辑问题解决）以及智能体行为——因此需要开发一个全面、精确且稳健的奖励系统。

items.en: Although some studies report that even random or imperfect feedback can sometimes yield benefits by steering models toward effective output patterns [35], we discover that when training a unified VLM across diverse skills, any weakness in the reward signal for a single capability can derail the entire training. As Figure˜5 illustrates, even if the STEM subdomain is provided with high-quality reward, a flaw in the reward for the multi-image QA task led to model collapse across all domains. This highlights that stable, effective RL demands finely tuned, hack-resistant verifiers in every domain—any weak verifier can destabilize and collapse the entire training.
items.zh: 尽管一些研究报告称，即使是随机或不完美的反馈有时也能通过引导模型走向有效的输出模式而带来好处[35]，但我们发现，在训练一个跨多种技能的统VLM时，任何单一能力的奖励信号弱点都可能导致整个训练偏离轨道。如图5所示，即使STEM子领域提供了高质量的奖励，多图像QA任务的奖励缺陷也会导致所有领域的模型崩溃。这突显了稳定、有效的RL需要在每个领域都有精细调整、抗攻击的验证器——任何弱的验证器都可能破坏并导致整个训练崩溃。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Training reward curves (top) and evaluation metrics (bottom) when low-quality verifiers exist in some multimodal sub-domains. The STEM verifier is finely tuned, but the other-single-image and other-multi-image verifiers are not, causing: (a) Reward noise@other-single-image: The model tweaks outputs to drive rewards up without improving actual accuracy. (b) Reward hacking@other-multi-image: The model learns shortcuts that repeatedly fool the verifier, inflating rewards. After step 150, STEM reward growth stalls, the overall multimodal benchmark declines, and STEM-related benchmarks (MMMU, MathVista, AI2D) drop sharply.
items.capZh: 图5：当某些多模态子领域存在低质量验证器时的训练奖励曲线（上）和评估指标（下）。STEM验证器经过精细调整，但其他单图像和其他多图像验证器没有，导致：(a) 其他单图像的奖励噪声：模型调整输出以推高奖励，但并未提高实际准确率。(b) 其他多图像的奖励黑客：模型学习到反复欺骗验证器的捷径，虚增奖励。在步骤150之后，STEM奖励增长停滞，整体多模态基准下降，STEM相关基准（MMMU、MathVista、AI2D）急剧下降。

items.en: We highlight several challenges and difficulties we identified in reward model design during our experiments below, and present our corresponding optimizations and solutions.
items.zh: 下面我们强调在实验中发现的奖励模型设计中的几个挑战和困难，并提出相应的优化和解决方案。

items.en: The extraction of the final answer in RLVR. For RLVR, we first extract the final answer from the model’s response and then conduct a correctness comparison. There are generally two extraction methods: rule-based extraction according to box markers and extraction via LLMs. The latter is more flexible, which doesn’t force the model to emit explicit box markers around the key answer, avoiding cumbersome format tuning and preserving the original user-friendly response format. We find that for simple academic questions (where the answer is usually a single number) or single-category tasks (where the answer follows a fixed-range format), it’s straightforward to design prompts that enable an LLM to extract the answer precisely. However, in our multimodal, open-domain RL setting, the diversity of questions and answers increases dramatically, making extraction significantly more complex with numerous corner cases. LLM-based extraction is often proved to be inaccurate, causing errors in the subsequent correctness judgment. Moreover, in some cases, the “answer” segment would loop or become excessively long, which is difficult or out-of-distribution for LLMs to extract the final answer, further undermining model-based extraction accuracy. To address these issues, we require the model during RLVR to explicitly mark the final answer with box tokens, and compare only the boxed content against the reference answer.
items.zh: RLVR中最终答案的提取。对于RLVR，我们首先从模型响应中提取最终答案，然后进行正确性比较。通常有两种提取方法：基于框标记的规则提取和通过LLM提取。后者更灵活，不强制模型在关键答案周围发出显式框标记，避免了繁琐的格式调整，并保留了原始的用户友好响应格式。我们发现，对于简单的学术问题（答案通常是单个数字）或单类别任务（答案遵循固定范围格式），设计提示使LLM能够精确提取答案很简单。然而，在我们的多模态、开放领域RL设置中，问题和答案的多样性急剧增加，使得提取变得非常复杂，存在许多边缘情况。基于LLM的提取通常被证明不准确，导致后续正确性判断出错。此外，在某些情况下，“答案”片段会循环或变得过长，LLM难以或无法提取最终答案，进一步降低了基于模型的提取准确性。为了解决这些问题，我们在RLVR期间要求模型使用框标记显式标记最终答案，并仅将框内内容与参考答案进行比较。

items.en: It is worth noting that many prior works use the \boxed{} label to denote final answers. However, when reference answers become complex (for example, the results of GUI agent tasks are expressed as complex function calls), \boxed{} can be ambiguous and difficult to parse automatically. Therefore, we introduced special tokens into the vocabulary and instead mark answer spans as: <|begin_of_box|>{FINAL_ANSWER}<|end_of_box|>.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，许多先前的工作使用\boxed{}标签来表示最终答案。然而，当参考答案变得复杂时（例如，GUI智能体任务的结果表示为复杂的函数调用），\boxed{}可能具有歧义且难以自动解析。因此，我们在词汇表中引入了特殊标记，并将答案跨度标记为：<|begin_of_box|>{FINAL_ANSWER}<|end_of_box|>。

items.en: Avoid reward hacking. A coarse or incomplete reward design can lead the model to discover shortcuts for boosting its reward rather than truly improving its task performance. For example, in pilot experiments, we find that after more than 500 training iterations, an imprudently designed verifier could be hacked as follows: for a counting problem, the model would answer “a correct number between 0 and 10”, and for a relativity question about speed, it would answer “a velocity very close to the speed of light” – responses that successfully fool some LLM-based reward models and get high reward.
items.zh: 避免奖励黑客。粗糙或不完整的奖励设计可能导致模型发现提高奖励的捷径，而不是真正提高任务性能。例如，在试点实验中，我们发现经过500多次训练迭代后，一个设计不谨慎的验证器可能被黑客攻击如下：对于一个计数问题，模型会回答“一个介于0和10之间的正确数字”；对于一个关于速度的相对论问题，它会回答“一个非常接近光速的速度”——这些响应成功欺骗了一些基于LLM的奖励模型并获得高奖励。

items.en: Domain-specific reward system. The optimal verifier varies between multimodal subdomains and is tightly coupled to the task—for instance, “43” and “43.0” are equivalent in a math problem but not in an OCR context. To deliver more accurate rewards across all domains, we develop a domain-specific reward system with the following features:
items.zh: 领域特定奖励系统。最佳验证器因多模态子领域而异，并且与任务紧密耦合——例如，“43”和“43.0”在数学问题中是等价的，但在OCR上下文中则不是。为了在所有领域提供更准确的奖励，我们开发了一个具有以下特征的领域特定奖励系统：

items.en: Shared verification functions: Common checks—such as format validation, boxed content extraction, and exact matching—are implemented as reusable functions to streamline development.
items.zh: 共享验证函数：通用检查——例如格式验证、框内容提取和精确匹配——作为可重用函数实现，以简化开发。

items.en: Domain-specific modules: Each domain has its own submodule supporting complex verification logic, including branching workflows, functional evaluations, and model-based judgments driven by custom judge prompts and hyperparameters.
items.zh: 领域特定模块：每个领域都有其子模块，支持复杂的验证逻辑，包括分支工作流、功能评估以及由自定义评判提示和超参数驱动的基于模型的判断。

items.en: Unit testing: To validate the reward system in each domain, we recommend defining unit tests that target that domain’s output distribution and iteratively refining the reward logic based on test results.
items.zh: 单元测试：为了验证每个领域的奖励系统，我们建议定义针对该领域输出分布的单元测试，并根据测试结果迭代优化奖励逻辑。

items.en: For example, in chart QA, numeric answers are verified against a relative tolerance threshold; for textual answers, we first check for an exact match and, if none is found, fall back to an LLM-based semantic equivalence assessment. We summarize some of our domain-specific verifiers below and will open-source this reward system to support further academic research.
items.zh: 例如，在图表问答中，数值答案根据相对容差阈值进行验证；对于文本答案，我们首先检查精确匹配，如果没有找到，则退回到基于LLM的语义等价评估。我们在下面总结了一些领域特定的验证器，并将开源此奖励系统以支持进一步的学术研究。

items.en: Beyond the domain-specific content checking above, we also build a format-and-style-checking reward system using both rule-based and model-based judgments. In format checking, any response to non-verifiable data whose <answer> content contains the special markers <|begin_of_box|> <|end_of_box|> is penalized with a minimal reward. For style checking, we similarly assign a low reward if the <think> content or <answer> content includes extensive mixed Chinese and English segments or large blocks of repetitive text. In addition, a text-based reward model evaluates the <answer> content for instruction compliance and fluency, encouraging outputs that adhere closely to the prompt while remaining coherent and logically rigorous.
items.zh: 除了上述领域特定的内容检查外，我们还构建了一个格式和风格检查的奖励系统，使用基于规则和基于模型的判断。在格式检查中，任何对不可验证数据的响应，如果其<answer>内容包含特殊标记<|begin_of_box|> <|end_of_box|>，则会被惩罚以最小奖励。对于风格检查，如果<think>内容或<answer>内容包含大量中英文混合段落或大块重复文本，我们同样分配低奖励。此外，基于文本的奖励模型评估<answer>内容的指令遵循性和流畅性，鼓励输出既紧密遵循提示，又保持连贯和逻辑严谨。

items.en: During RL training, we blend data from each multimodal domain in predetermined proportions, verify every domain using the reward system described in section˜5.2, and optimize with GRPO [36] objective. To ensure that GLM-4.1V-Thinking reaches its full potential for each multimodal subdomain, we first run pilot experiments on each subdomain to evaluate its training difficulty, performance-improvement potential and the required training tokens in the corresponding dataset. These insights guide the allocation of training data proportions in the RL process.
items.zh: 在强化学习训练期间，我们按预定比例混合来自每个多模态领域的数据，使用第5.2节描述的奖励系统验证每个领域，并使用GRPO [36]目标进行优化。为了确保GLM-4.1V-Thinking在每个多模态子领域达到其全部潜力，我们首先在每个子领域进行试点实验，评估其训练难度、性能提升潜力以及相应数据集中所需的训练token。这些见解指导了强化学习过程中训练数据比例的分配。

items.en: One challenge is that, as RL training progresses, the model’s effective learning efficiency inevitably declines as its capabilities improve: many examples become too trivial to drive further learning. For instance, in GRPO, a rollout batch in which all samples are answered correctly yields no useful gradient. In our pilot experiment, over half of all prompts achieve accuracy over 90% after just 200 training steps. Meanwhile, rollout efficiency remains the primary bottleneck: the bulk of training time is consumed by rollouts. Consequently, it is essential to select the most informative, appropriately challenging problems for rollout.
items.zh: 一个挑战是，随着强化学习训练的进行，模型的有效学习效率不可避免地随着其能力的提升而下降：许多示例变得过于简单，无法驱动进一步的学习。例如，在GRPO中，一个所有样本都回答正确的rollout批次不会产生有用的梯度。在我们的试点实验中，仅经过200个训练步骤，超过一半的提示准确率超过90%。同时，rollout效率仍然是主要瓶颈：大部分训练时间消耗在rollout上。因此，选择信息量最大、难度适中的问题进行rollout至关重要。

items.en: To maximize learning efficiency, we propose Reinforcement Learning with Curriculum Sampling (RLCS), which applies the insight of curriculum learning to online sampling. We employ an adaptive curriculum that continuously adjusts the difficulty of training samples to match the model’s evolving capabilities, ensuring each update is maximally informative. To achieve this, we evaluate sample difficulty both offline and online. Before training, we assess the inherent difficulty of every sample by running pass@k evaluations across the full dataset with several established vision-language models (or earlier RL checkpoints) and merging those quantitative scores with expert human difficulty annotations. This process yields a set of fine-grained difficulty labels that partition our data into multiple tiers, from very easy through very hard. During training, we perform online difficulty grading. For each generated rollout, we record the pass@k outcome, map it to its corresponding difficulty tier, and merge these results with our offline labels. This online difficulty distribution also offers valuable insights into the model’s current performance.
items.zh: 为了最大化学习效率，我们提出了基于课程采样的强化学习（RLCS），它将课程学习的见解应用于在线采样。我们采用自适应课程，持续调整训练样本的难度以匹配模型不断发展的能力，确保每次更新都信息量最大。为此，我们离线评估样本难度，也进行在线评估。训练前，我们通过使用几个已建立的视觉语言模型（或早期强化学习检查点）在整个数据集上运行pass@k评估，并将这些定量分数与专家人工难度注释合并，来评估每个样本的内在难度。这个过程产生一组细粒度的难度标签，将我们的数据划分为多个层级，从非常简单到非常难。训练期间，我们进行在线难度分级。对于每个生成的rollout，我们记录pass@k结果，将其映射到相应的难度层级，并将这些结果与我们的离线标签合并。这种在线难度分布也为模型当前性能提供了有价值的见解。

items.en: By leveraging these difficulty labels alongside the model’s subcategory performance, we continuously re-weight the sampling ratios of different difficulty categories at the granularity of training iterations. The core idea is to down-sample examples that are too trivial, as well as those that currently prove too challenging, and boost exposure to the mid-range difficulties where the model gains the most. Empirically, we observe that RLCS significantly accelerates model improvement and consistently leads to performance gains.
items.zh: 通过利用这些难度标签以及模型的子类别性能，我们在训练迭代的粒度上持续重新加权不同难度类别的采样比例。核心思想是降低过于简单以及当前过于困难的示例的采样，增加模型获益最多的中等难度示例的曝光。经验上，我们观察到RLCS显著加速了模型改进，并持续带来性能提升。

items.en: Besides, we make particular efforts to improve the effectiveness, efficiency, and stability of RLCS. Here, we share as comprehensively as possible the lessons learned, insights gained, and methods developed in optimizing the training process.
items.zh: 此外，我们特别努力提高RLCS的有效性、效率和稳定性。在此，我们尽可能全面地分享在优化训练过程中学到的经验、获得的见解以及开发的方法。

items.en: To improve the performance upper bound of multimodal reinforcement learning, we propose and incorporate the following enhancements:
items.zh: 为了提高多模态强化学习的性能上限，我们提出并加入了以下增强：

items.en: Larger batch size. When mixing multi-domain multimodal data during training, a relatively large batch size is recommended to achieve a higher performance ceiling in the long run.
items.zh: 更大的批次大小。在训练期间混合多领域多模态数据时，建议使用相对较大的批次大小，以在长期内实现更高的性能上限。

items.en: Dynamic sampling expansion via ratio EMA. In GRPO, when both entropy and KL losses are removed, a rollout batch composed entirely of correct or entirely of incorrect samples provides no useful gradient. In other words, the all-correct/incorrect prompts reduce the usable batch size. As the proportion of these all-correct or all-incorrect batches grows or fluctuates, the effective batch size can vary wildly, degrading training stability. To address this, we perform rollouts with an intentional oversampling factor expansion_ratio, and then select the subset of samples whose difficulty is most balanced (i.e., with the numbers of correct and incorrect responses as close as possible). Concretely, for each rollout, we compute the expansion ratio as expansion_ratio=1/(1−not_valid_sample_rate)\texttt{expansion\_ratio}=1/(1-\texttt{not\_valid\_sample\_rate}), where not_valid_sample_rate denotes the fraction of samples that are all-correct or all-incorrect in the last iteration. We then maintain an exponential moving average, expansion_ratio_ema, of this ratio and use it as the oversampling coefficient in the next iteration. Compared to [52], this method predetermines the total number of rollout samples, facilitating parallel sampling and balanced rollout allocation, which aligns more closely with the underlying large-scale RL infrastructure for greater efficiency.
items.zh: 通过比率EMA进行动态采样扩展。在GRPO中，当熵损失和KL损失都被移除时，一个完全由正确或完全由错误样本组成的rollout批次不会提供有用的梯度。换句话说，全正确/全错误的提示会减少有效批次大小。随着这些全正确或全错误批次的比例增长或波动，有效批次大小可能剧烈变化，降低训练稳定性。为了解决这个问题，我们以有意的过采样因子expansion_ratio进行rollout，然后选择难度最平衡的样本子集（即正确和错误响应数量尽可能接近）。具体来说，对于每次rollout，我们计算扩展比率为expansion_ratio=1/(1−not_valid_sample_rate)，其中not_valid_sample_rate表示上一次迭代中全正确或全错误样本的比例。然后，我们维护该比率的指数移动平均expansion_ratio_ema，并将其用作下一次迭代的过采样系数。与[52]相比，该方法预先确定rollout样本的总数，便于并行采样和平衡的rollout分配，更符合底层大规模强化学习基础设施，从而提高效率。

items.en: Force answering. When the thinking process becomes excessively long, it may be truncated by the rollout length limit. Because the model then fails to produce an answer, it is typically assigned a reward of zero. However, such lengthy reasoning isn’t necessarily incorrect — for difficult questions, the generated part of an overlong thinking path can be perfectly valid. Truncating in this way not only wastes rollout budget but also injects noise into training. To address this, we enforce a forced truncation by inserting a </think> token followed by an <answer> token, which prompts the model to emit a final answer and allows us to award a fair reward for its reasoning [51]. We found that this method encourages the model to learn how to provide an appropriate answer after any amount of thinking, facilitating dynamic control of the thinking budget at test time.
items.zh: 强制回答。当思考过程变得过长时，可能会被rollout长度限制截断。由于模型随后无法产生答案，通常会被分配零奖励。然而，这种冗长的推理不一定错误——对于困难问题，过长的思考路径中生成的部分可能完全有效。以这种方式截断不仅浪费rollout预算，还会向训练中注入噪声。为了解决这个问题，我们通过插入</think>标记后跟<answer>标记来强制截断，这促使模型发出最终答案，并允许我们为其推理分配公平的奖励[51]。我们发现，这种方法鼓励模型学习在任何思考量后提供适当的答案，有助于在测试时动态控制思考预算。

items.en: Discard KL loss. Compared to text-only models, vision-language models usually experience a faster increase in KL divergence during reinforcement learning. However, when we apply a KL loss to explicitly suppress this increase, the model’s capabilities are noticeably constrained. Therefore, we remove the KL loss.
items.zh: 丢弃KL损失。与纯文本模型相比，视觉语言模型在强化学习期间通常经历更快的KL散度增加。然而，当我们应用KL损失来明确抑制这种增加时，模型的能力会受到明显限制。因此，我们移除了KL损失。

items.en: Clip-higher. In multimodal RL, similar to [52], increasing the upper clipping bound of the importance sampling ratio also proved useful for improving both off-policy performance and preventing excessive entropy collapse.
items.zh: Clip-higher。在多模态强化学习中，类似于[52]，增加重要性采样比率的上限裁剪边界也被证明有助于提高离策略性能并防止过度熵崩溃。

items.en: We also share our observations and insights gained from large-scale cross-domain reinforcement learning. We believe that these insights can help improve the RL effectiveness in the future.
items.zh: 我们还分享了从大规模跨领域强化学习中获得的观察和见解。我们相信这些见解有助于未来提高强化学习效果。

items.en: The peak performance in the RL phase does not perfectly correlate with a cold-start SFT model’s performance. For instance, in one of our experiments, increasing cold-start training from 1,000 to 2,000 steps boosts the post-cold-start performance by about two points on average. However, after RL, both checkpoints converge to nearly the same performance. In other words, a higher score after cold-start does not guarantee greater RL potential; with proper training, RL can elevate base models of equal inherent potential to the same peak.
items.zh: 强化学习阶段的峰值性能与冷启动SFT模型的性能并不完全相关。例如，在我们的一项实验中，将冷启动训练从1000步增加到2000步，使冷启动后的性能平均提高约两个点。然而，经过强化学习后，两个检查点收敛到几乎相同的性能。换句话说，冷启动后更高的分数并不保证更大的强化学习潜力；通过适当的训练，强化学习可以将具有相同内在潜力的基础模型提升到相同的峰值。

items.en: Domain interference in RL is less pronounced than in SFT. Performance on under- or untrained domains that are orthogonal to the RL training domain can be preserved quite well. Moreover, cross-domain generalization, where improvements in one domain transfer to others, is frequently observed.
items.zh: 强化学习中的领域干扰不如SFT中明显。与强化学习训练领域正交的未训练或训练不足领域的性能可以很好地保持。此外，经常观察到跨领域泛化，即一个领域的改进会转移到其他领域。

items.en: To enhance training robustness and prevent collapse during RL, we identified several key factors that significantly impact stability throughout the training pipeline:
items.zh: 为了提高训练鲁棒性并防止强化学习期间的崩溃，我们确定了几个关键因素，这些因素在整个训练流程中对稳定性有显著影响：

items.en: The quality of cold-start SFT data has a critical impact on training stability. Therefore, it is strongly recommended to maintain the cold-start data quality above a certain threshold. For example, if the cold-start data contains a large amount of meaningless thinking paths, the resulting model exhibits severe instability during RL training or even leads to training collapse.
items.zh: 冷启动SFT数据的质量对训练稳定性有至关重要的影响。因此，强烈建议将冷启动数据质量保持在某个阈值以上。例如，如果冷启动数据包含大量无意义的思考路径，则生成的模型在强化学习训练期间会表现出严重的不稳定性，甚至导致训练崩溃。

items.en: We found that incorporating an entropy loss to promote diversity could cause the model to produce garbled output, which eventually leads to training collapse, so we removed the entropy loss.
items.zh: 我们发现，加入熵损失以促进多样性可能导致模型产生乱码输出，最终导致训练崩溃，因此我们移除了熵损失。

items.en: During rollouts, using top-p=1\text{top-p}=1 instead of a smaller value produces more stable RL training. Although some prior works advocate lowering top-p (e.g. to 0.9) to reduce variance and stabilize rollouts, we observe that this actually increases the risk of garbling over time. In contrast, setting top-p to 1 eliminates the garbled outputs that tend to appear in later iterations. We hypothesize that top-p=1\text{top-p}=1 ensures full vocabulary coverage, preventing the under-learning of rare tokens and thus maintaining clean output. While this choice does introduce more randomness during sampling, it ultimately enhances both stability and performance in the RL phase.
items.zh: 在展开过程中，使用 top-p=1 而非较小值能产生更稳定的强化学习训练。尽管一些先前的工作主张降低 top-p（例如到 0.9）以减少方差并稳定展开，但我们观察到这实际上增加了随时间出现乱码的风险。相反，将 top-p 设为 1 消除了在后期迭代中倾向于出现的乱码输出。我们假设 top-p=1 确保了完整的词汇覆盖，防止了稀有 token 的欠学习，从而保持了输出的清晰。虽然这一选择确实在采样中引入了更多随机性，但它最终增强了强化学习阶段的稳定性和性能。

items.en: We compared per-sample (averaging tokens’ loss within each sample, then averaging across samples) and per-token (averaging all tokens’ loss within a batch, then averaging across batches) loss computation methods and observed no significant difference in mean reward, but per-sample loss computation yielded more stable training.
items.zh: 我们比较了逐样本（先对每个样本内的 token 损失求平均，再对所有样本平均）和逐 token（先对批次内所有 token 损失求平均，再对所有批次平均）的损失计算方法，观察到在平均奖励上没有显著差异，但逐样本损失计算产生了更稳定的训练。

items.en: Although format-based rewards during RL can help nudge outputs toward the correct structure, we strongly recommend that the model fully learn the required output format during the cold-start phase rather than depending on RL. In our experience, if the format errors frequently occur, the mixture of format and correctness reward may destabilize training.
items.zh: 尽管强化学习中的格式奖励有助于将输出推向正确结构，但我们强烈建议模型在冷启动阶段完全学习所需的输出格式，而不是依赖强化学习。根据我们的经验，如果格式错误频繁出现，格式奖励与正确性奖励的混合可能会破坏训练的稳定性。

items.en: To maximize RL training efficiency and performance, we extensively optimize our RL infrastructure, focusing on the following components:
items.zh: 为了最大化强化学习训练效率和性能，我们广泛优化了强化学习基础设施，重点关注以下组件：

items.en: Load balancing of sequence lengths across DP ranks. Since the rollout length of each sample is unknown beforehand, some ranks may be assigned many extremely long sequences (e.g., video or long-document prompts, or difficult problems with long responses). Without balancing total sequence length across DP (Data Parallel) ranks, the slowest rank dictates the overall training speed. To address this, after rollout and before assigning training samples to each DP rank, we balance both sequence length and compute load across ranks so that forward-backward passes per rank remain within a tight range, thereby maximizing throughput.
items.zh: 跨数据并行等级的序列长度负载均衡。由于每个样本的展开长度事先未知，某些等级可能被分配许多极长的序列（例如视频或长文档提示，或需要长回答的难题）。如果不平衡跨数据并行等级的总序列长度，最慢的等级将决定整体训练速度。为解决此问题，在展开后、将训练样本分配给每个数据并行等级之前，我们平衡了各等级的序列长度和计算负载，使得每个等级的前向-后向传播时间保持在紧密范围内，从而最大化吞吐量。

items.en: Intra-rank training with sequence packing and gradient accumulation. Because sample lengths vary unpredictably in RL, we cannot know in advance how many forward passes each DP rank will perform. We solve this by combining sequence packing with gradient accumulation: each optimization step comprises multiple micro-steps of forward and backward passes, where each micro-step packs several samples into a fixed-length sequence of length context_length=32​K\text{context\_length}=32\mathrm{K}, padding unused positions. During training, we weight and average micro-step gradients by sample count, which is mathematically equivalent to computing gradients over the entire rollout batch at once.
items.zh: 等级内训练结合序列打包和梯度累积。由于强化学习中样本长度变化不可预测，我们无法事先知道每个数据并行等级将执行多少次前向传播。我们通过将序列打包与梯度累积相结合来解决这一问题：每个优化步骤包含多个前向和后向传播的微步，每个微步将多个样本打包成固定长度的序列（长度 context_length=32K），未使用的位置进行填充。在训练期间，我们根据样本数量对微步梯度进行加权平均，这在数学上等同于一次性对整个展开批次计算梯度。

items.en: Sample packing and reorganization within DP ranks. Building on the previous strategy, training is decoupled from the number of samples per forward-backward pass. We therefore apply an efficient sample re-packing heuristic to complete all samples in as few micro-steps as possible. In practice, this optimization halves our forward-backward time.
items.zh: 数据并行等级内的样本打包与重组。基于上述策略，训练与前向-后向传播的样本数量解耦。因此，我们应用一种高效的样本重打包启发式方法，以尽可能少的微步完成所有样本。在实践中，这一优化将我们的前向-后向时间减半。

items.en: Dynamic sampling expansion via ratio EMA. To oversample and then select moderately difficult examples, we propose and implement dynamic sampling expansion via ratio EMA algorithm, which is detailed in section˜5.3.1. Our approach precomputes the required sample count for parallel rollout, greatly improving efficiency.
items.zh: 通过比率 EMA 进行动态采样扩展。为了过采样然后选择中等难度的样本，我们提出并实现了通过比率 EMA 算法的动态采样扩展，详见第 5.3.1 节。我们的方法预先计算并行展开所需的样本数量，大大提高了效率。

items.en: Tested with a predefined set of marks (SoM).
items.zh: 使用预定义的标记集（SoM）进行测试。

items.en: Tested with the input of screenshot and accessibility tree.
items.zh: 使用截图和可访问性树的输入进行测试。

items.en: In this section, we present the evaluation details and results of GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking. In §6.1, we show the comprehensive evaluation setting; the full quantitative comparison results are listed in §6.2.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍 GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 的评估细节和结果。在第 6.1 节中，我们展示了全面的评估设置；完整的定量比较结果列于第 6.2 节。

items.en: To comprehensively assess the capabilities of GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking, we conduct evaluations across 28 public benchmarks, covering eight distinct categories: General VQA, STEM, OCR & Chart, Long Document, Visual Grounding, GUI Agents, Coding, and Video Understanding. The following benchmarks are used for evaluation:
items.zh: 为了全面评估 GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 的能力，我们在 28 个公开基准上进行了评估，涵盖八个不同类别：通用 VQA、STEM、OCR 与图表、长文档、视觉定位、GUI 智能体、编码和视频理解。使用的基准如下：

items.en: General VQA: MMBench-V1.1 [25], MMStar [5], BLINK [9], MUIRBENCH [43];
items.zh: 通用 VQA：MMBench-V1.1 [25]、MMStar [5]、BLINK [9]、MUIRBENCH [43]；

items.en: STEM: MMMU [53], MMMU-Pro [54], VideoMMMU [19], MathVista [27], WeMath [32], AI2D [22];
items.zh: STEM：MMMU [53]、MMMU-Pro [54]、VideoMMMU [19]、MathVista [27]、WeMath [32]、AI2D [22]；

items.en: OCR & Chart: OCRBench [26], ChartQAPro [30], ChartMuseum [39]
items.zh: OCR 与图表：OCRBench [26]、ChartQAPro [30]、ChartMuseum [39]；

items.en: Visual Grounding: RefCOCO-avg (val) [21];
items.zh: 视觉定位：RefCOCO-avg (val) [21]；

items.en: GUI Agents: OSWorld [49], Android World [33], WebVoyager Some [15], Webquest-QA [44];
items.zh: GUI 智能体：OSWorld [49]、Android World [33]、WebVoyager Some [15]、Webquest-QA [44]；

items.en: Coding: Design2Code [37], Flame-VLM-Code [1];
items.zh: 编码：Design2Code [37]、Flame-VLM-Code [1]；

items.en: Video Understanding: VideoMME [8], MMVU [56], LVBench [46], MotionBench [16];
items.zh: 视频理解：VideoMME [8]、MMVU [56]、LVBench [46]、MotionBench [16]；

items.en: We use vLLM 111https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm as the backend for model inference. The maximum output length for each model response is set to 8,192 tokens. For visual input configuration, we set the maximum expected length for image inputs to 6,144 tokens, and 30,000 tokens for video benchmarks. The predicted answer is extracted as the string enclosed within special boxed tokens (<|begin_of_box|>…<|end_of_box|>), which we define as the model’s final output. For benchmarks that require answer extraction or scoring by a language model, we consistently use GPT-4o (2024-11-20) [31] for this purpose. To ensure fairness, all models—including GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking and its open-source counterparts—are evaluated using the same toolchain, policies, and prompt templates. For each model, we enforce a minimum successful request rate of 95% on every benchmark. Samples that fail due to generation errors or API issues are excluded from scoring, ensuring that final metrics reflect only valid outputs.
items.zh: 我们使用 vLLM 111https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm 作为模型推理的后端。每个模型响应的最大输出长度设置为 8,192 个 token。对于视觉输入配置，我们将图像输入的最大预期长度设置为 6,144 个 token，视频基准测试设置为 30,000 个 token。预测答案被提取为特殊框标记（<|begin_of_box|>…<|end_of_box|>）内的字符串，我们将其定义为模型的最终输出。对于需要语言模型进行答案提取或评分的基准测试，我们一致使用 GPT-4o (2024-11-20) [31] 进行此操作。为确保公平性，所有模型（包括 GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 及其开源对应模型）均使用相同的工具链、策略和提示模板进行评估。对于每个模型，我们在每个基准测试上强制执行至少 95% 的成功请求率。由于生成错误或 API 问题而失败的样本将被排除在评分之外，确保最终指标仅反映有效输出。

full.secZh: 6.2 与其他先进多模态大语言模型对比

items.en: We compare GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking against a wide range of open source state-of-the-art MLLMs, including MiMo-VL [40], Kimi-VL [42], InternVL3 [57], and Qwen-VL series [3]. As shown in Table 2, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking sets a new state-of-the-art across 23 out of 28 benchmarks among models under 10B parameters, demonstrating consistent and robust performance across a wide spectrum of multimodal tasks.
items.zh: 我们将 GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 与广泛的开源最先进 MLLM 进行比较，包括 MiMo-VL [40]、Kimi-VL [42]、InternVL3 [57] 和 Qwen-VL 系列 [3]。如表 2 所示，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 在参数低于 10B 的模型中，在 28 个基准测试中的 23 个上设立了新的最先进水平，展示了在广泛多模态任务中一致且稳健的性能。

items.en: In the domain of General VQA, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking surpasses all competing open-source models under 10B on five widely-used benchmarks, covering both single-image and multi-image settings. This underscores the model’s strong general-purpose visual reasoning capabilities and its adeptness in both factual and inferential question answering across varying visual contexts.
items.zh: 在通用 VQA 领域，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 在五个广泛使用的基准测试上超越了所有参数低于 10B 的竞争开源模型，涵盖单图像和多图像设置。这突显了模型强大的通用视觉推理能力，以及在不同视觉背景下处理事实性和推理性问答的熟练程度。

items.en: Within the STEM category, our model achieves the highest performance on challenging science and engineering benchmarks such as MMMU_Val, MMMU_Pro, VideoMMMU, and AI2D. These results indicate a particularly strong capacity for structured and domain-specific reasoning. On mathematics-centric tasks such as MathVista and WeMath, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking remains competitive, although slightly behind MiMo-VL, suggesting potential room for enhancement in symbolic and arithmetic reasoning.
items.zh: 在 STEM 类别中，我们的模型在具有挑战性的科学和工程基准测试（如 MMMU_Val、MMMU_Pro、VideoMMMU 和 AI2D）上取得了最高性能。这些结果表明模型在结构化和领域特定推理方面具有特别强大的能力。在数学中心任务（如 MathVista 和 WeMath）上，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 保持竞争力，尽管略逊于 MiMo-VL，表明在符号和算术推理方面仍有提升空间。

items.en: In the domain of OCR & Chart, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking sets new state-of-the-art scores on both ChartQAPro and ChartMuseum, demonstrating strong capabilities in structured data extraction from plots and charts. On OCRBench, it performs competitively, slightly behind InternVL3 and MiMo-VL, indicating solid but improvable text recognition in natural images.
items.zh: 在 OCR 和图表领域，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 在 ChartQAPro 和 ChartMuseum 上均取得了新的最先进分数，展示了从图表中提取结构化数据的强大能力。在 OCRBench 上，它表现具有竞争力，略逊于 InternVL3 和 MiMo-VL，表明在自然图像中的文本识别能力扎实但仍有改进空间。

items.en: For Long Document Understanding, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking outperforms all other models on MMLongBench, revealing strong capacity for reasoning over extended sequences, maintaining cross-page coherence, and handling complex document layouts.
items.zh: 对于长文档理解，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 在 MMLongBench 上优于所有其他模型，展示了在长序列推理、保持跨页连贯性和处理复杂文档布局方面的强大能力。

items.en: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking also establishes new state-of-the-art results in emerging tasks involving GUI Agents and multimodal Coding. Its significant margin over competitors in these areas highlights its strong cross-modal reasoning ability and semantic alignment between visual interfaces and code representations.
items.zh: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 还在涉及 GUI 智能体和多模态编码的新兴任务中取得了新的最先进结果。它在这些领域显著领先于竞争对手，突显了其强大的跨模态推理能力以及视觉界面与代码表示之间的语义对齐。

items.en: In the area of Video Understanding, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking demonstrates robust performance, leading on benchmarks such as VideoMME, MMVU, and MotionBench. These results emphasize its advanced spatio-temporal reasoning abilities, crucial for interpreting dynamic and multi-frame visual content. Meanwhile, for Visual Grounding, the model delivers solid results on RefCOCO, performing on par with or better than many larger-scale competitors.
items.zh: 在视频理解领域，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 表现出稳健的性能，在 VideoMME、MMVU 和 MotionBench 等基准测试上领先。这些结果强调了其先进的时空推理能力，这对于解释动态和多帧视觉内容至关重要。同时，在视觉定位方面，该模型在 RefCOCO 上取得了扎实的结果，与许多更大规模的竞争对手表现相当或更好。

items.en: Remarkably, despite its relatively compact size, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking outperforms the much larger Qwen2.5-VL-72B model on 18 out of 28 benchmarks, including particularly challenging tasks such as MMStar, MUIRBENCH, MMMU_Pro, and ChartMuseum. This illustrates the superior efficiency and capability of our model, making it a compelling choice for real-world deployment where computational resources are constrained. Furthermore, compared with the proprietary GPT-4o, GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking achieves superior results on most of tasks (e.g., MMStar, MUIRBENCH, AI2D, MMMU-Pro, MathVista, and MotionBench), despite GPT-4o’s significantly larger scale and closed-source advantage. These findings emphasize that our model offers an excellent trade-off between performance and efficiency, making it a practical and powerful solution for real-world deployment under resource constraints.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，尽管尺寸相对紧凑，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 在 28 个基准测试中的 18 个上优于更大的 Qwen2.5-VL-72B 模型，包括特别具有挑战性的任务，如 MMStar、MUIRBENCH、MMMU_Pro 和 ChartMuseum。这说明了我们模型的卓越效率和能力，使其成为计算资源受限的实际部署中的引人注目的选择。此外，与专有模型 GPT-4o 相比，GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking 在大多数任务上取得了更优的结果（例如 MMStar、MUIRBENCH、AI2D、MMMU-Pro、MathVista 和 MotionBench），尽管 GPT-4o 规模显著更大且具有闭源优势。这些发现强调，我们的模型在性能和效率之间提供了出色的权衡，使其成为资源约束下实际部署的实用且强大的解决方案。

full.sec: 6.3 Investigating Cross-Domain Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
full.secZh: 6.3 强化学习跨领域泛化研究

items.en: While multi-domain RL successfully improves the overall performance, there is one remaining question: In the course of RL, is it possible for the various multimodal domains to generalize to and reinforce one another, or will they instead antagonize and interfere with each other? To explore this question, we selected four representative domains: STEM, OCR & Chart, Grounding, and GUI agents.
